channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 18th June
item.description:
ENWD Pothole FW 1700x1100x55mm approx Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 18th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 18th June
item.description:
15MDB CWPH 600 X 400 X 52MM MARKED AS NUMBER 1 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 18th June
item.description:
PERM- job 42661059 - PITTVILLE CIRCUS ROAD - CHELTENHAM Perm Repair required MAKE SAFE PLEASE REMOVE X1 KNOCKED DOWN PERMIT SIGN AND POST TAKE BACK TO BAM DEPOT approx 3 meters long in verge (Damaged Street Furniture)
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 18th June
item.description:
Cut back hedge both sides Approx 30mts long by 2.5 mts high Standard TM required with fway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A post is lying on the grass verge, 18th June
item.description:
A38 Tewkesbury Road Norton, between Walnut Gardens and the property known as Locks Paddock. What3Words: stew.majority.collision

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A38, Down Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Tyre on grass verge, 18th June
item.description:
A tyre left on the verge A38 Tewkesbury Road, Norton What3words: rainbow.twitching.pillows

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A38, Down Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 18th June

item.title: The tarmac has become degraded and potholes are forming, 18th June
item.description:
Ermin Street over bridge left leads to Brockworth business park, right takes you to the dual carriageway. The road on the bridge is like rubbles. Reported by several residents concerned that highways have fixed potholes close by an appears this section of road has had not attention
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
